abp_assumptions.A6: M&A pipeline provides ≥2 actionable acquisition targets per quarter

hedging_actions: Maintain pre-approved term sheet templates for distressed acquisitions
Establish standing NDA with top-3 EMEA hotel transaction advisors
Brief investment committee monthly on active pipeline

indicators.name: Distressed asset pipeline
indicators.description: Count and discount depth of distressed hotel assets available for acquisition
indicators.recommendation: 8 distressed assets in pipeline; 4 at ≥25% discount — strong acquisition opportunity.

indicators.name: Best distressed acquisition — discount
indicators.description: Single highest-discount distressed hotel asset currently in market
indicators.recommendation: Top target: Citygate Hotel Frankfurt in Frankfurt, Germany — Insolvency.

indicators.name: Fund portfolio exit signals
indicators.description: Active fund mandates and portfolio sales expected to reach market
indicators.recommendation: 6 active fund exit signals detected — strong pipeline of portfolio opportunities.

indicators.name: PE fund exit readiness
indicators.description: Private equity funds approaching end of hold period with hotel portfolios
indicators.recommendation: 10 PE exits imminent (≤2027); total implied value EUR 4623m — exceptional deal flow.

indicators.name: Competitor disposal signals
indicators.description: Hotels being disposed of by competitors creating management contract opportunities
indicators.recommendation: 5 competitor disposals active; 1332 total rooms — proactively approach sellers.
